title: A Lucky Day in the City
article_text: I was walking to the library when I saw a coat on the ground. The coat had a pocket with some money inside, and I felt lucky. I wanted to return the money because it was the right thing to do. I was watching the street for a long time, doing an observation of the people. A man was running after a crash, and he looked worried. He was eating meat from a dish, and he seemed to have no concentration. The implication of the crash was that someone was hurt, so I decided to defend the man. He was a classic king of the street, but he was unusual because he was very kind. The interaction between us was short, but I learned a fundamental lesson about honesty. I used to borrow money from friends, but now I know I should not bother others for help.

sentences.en: I was walking to the library when I saw a coat on the ground.
sentences.zh: 我正走去图书馆时，看到地上有一件外套。

sentences.en: I wanted to return the money because it was the right thing to do.

sentences.en: I was watching the street for a long time, doing an observation of the people.

sentences.en: He was eating meat from a dish, and he seemed to have no concentration.

words.eng_def: the flesh of an animal used as food

sentences.en: The implication of the crash was that someone was hurt, so I decided to defend the man.

sentences.en: He was a classic king of the street, but he was unusual because he was very kind.

sentences.en: The interaction between us was short, but I learned a fundamental lesson about honesty.
